content: Finally done with the floorpan rust repair. Took way longer than expected but the welds came out clean.
Nice work! What gauge steel did you use for the patches?
18 gauge cold rolled. Same as OEM spec. Welded with my Miller 211.
Anyone know a good source for S30 weatherstripping? OEM reproductions preferred.
Check ZCarSource or Motorsport Auto. Both have decent repro kits.
